title: armeria maritima var. fontqueri
intro: Armeria maritima var. fontqueri, also known as Sea Thrift Fontqueri, is a variety of low-growing, evergreen perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of saponins and essential oils. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Armeria maritima var. fontqueri can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
